name: weather
description: Weather block class — a $block subclass that displays current conditions, a forecast, and recent history for a configured place. Owner sets `place`, `units`, and `forecast_hours`; an external plug Worker (catalogs/weather/plug) fetches tomorrow.io on a schedule and pushes data via apikey-bound session.

classes.description: A weather display block. The owner configures `place` (a town name or zip code), `timezone` (IANA timezone for local display), `units` ("metric" or "imperial"), and `forecast_hours` (how many hours of forecast to surface). The plug sends `place` to the upstream API as configured and pushes `current` as a scalar shape (headline temperature), `forecast` as a table (hourly), and `history` as a series. `last_pushed_at` and `last_error` ride the standard $block writable_self surface so :look surfaces freshness.

verbs.name: weather_line
verbs.source: verb :weather_line() rxd { let current = this.current; let place = this:display_location(); if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "value")) { let unit = ""; if (has(current, "unit") && current["unit"]) { unit = current["unit"]; } return "Temperature in " + place + ": " + to_string(current["value"]) + unit; } return "Weather for " + place + ": no current reading yet"; }

verbs.name: display_location
verbs.source: verb :display_location() rxd { let place = this.place; if (typeof(place) != "string" || !str_trim(place)) { return "this location"; } return str_trim(place); }

verbs.name: current_time_text
verbs.source: verb :current_time_text() rxd { let current = this.current; if (typeof(current) == "map") { if (has(current, "observed_at_text") && typeof(current["observed_at_text"]) == "string" && current["observed_at_text"]) { return current["observed_at_text"]; } if (has(current, "observed_at") && typeof(current["observed_at"]) == "string") { let observed = current["observed_at"]; if (length(observed) >= 16) { return str_slice(observed, 1, 10) + " " + str_slice(observed, 12, 16) + " UTC"; } if (observed) { return observed; } } } return "an unknown time"; }

verbs.name: look_self
verbs.source: verb :look_self() rxd { let current = this.current; let place = this:display_location(); let line = this:weather_line(); let updated = this.last_pushed_at; let time = this:current_time_text(); let text = "The weather panel shows no current reading for " + place + "."; if (typeof(current) == "map" && has(current, "value")) { let unit = ""; if (has(current, "unit") && current["unit"]) { unit = current["unit"]; } text = "The weather panel shows that the temperature in " + place + " was " + to_string(current["value"]) + unit + " at " + time + "."; } if (this.last_error) { text = text + " Error: " + to_string(this.last_error) + "."; } return { id: this, title: line, description: text, current: current, forecast: this.forecast, history: this.history, last_pushed_at: updated, last_updated: updated, last_updated_text: time, last_error: this.last_error, location: location(this) }; }

classes.description: Metadata holder for the weather catalog: keeps the default summary_props list separate from the live class so plug installers and UI introspection can read it without colliding with subclass overrides.
